mapper.select: SELECT id_student AS id, id_student AS numericId, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT id_student AS id, id_student AS numericId, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE id_student = #{id}

SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id AS studentId, sc.name AS courseName, sc.starting_date AS startDate, sc.assured_finishing_date AS assuredFinishDate, st.status AS statusId FROM student_courses sc LEFT JOIN status_courses st ON sc.id = st.id_course WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT id_student AS id, id_student AS numericId, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE id_student = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, kana_name, nickname, mail_address, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{kanaName}, #{nickname}, #{mailAddress}, #{address}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark}, #{course}, #{deleted})
INSERT INTO student_courses (student_id, name, starting_date, assured_finishing_date) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseName}, #{startDate}, #{assuredFinishDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET name = #{name}, kana_name = #{kanaName}, nickname = #{nickname}, mail_address = #{mailAddress}, address = #{address}, age = #{age}, sex = #{sex}, remark = #{remark}, course = #{course}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id_student = #{id}
> UPDATE student_courses SET status = #{statusId}, starting_date = #{startDate}, assured_finishing_date = #{assuredFinishingDate} WHERE id_course = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id AS studentId, sc.name AS courseName, sc.starting_date AS startDate, sc.assured_finishing_date AS assuredFinishDate, st.status AS statusId FROM student_courses sc LEFT JOIN status_courses st ON sc.id = st.id_course

SELECT s.id_student AS studentId, s.name AS name, s.kana_name AS kanaName, s.nickname AS nickname, s.mail_address AS mailAddress, s.address AS address, s.age AS age, s.sex AS sex, s.remark AS remark, s.deleted AS deleted, sc.name AS courseName, st.status AS statusId FROM student s INNER JOIN student_courses sc ON s.id_student = sc.student_id LEFT JOIN status_courses st ON sc.id = st.id_course
sc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, name AS courseName, starting_date AS startDate, assured_finishing_date AS assuredFinishDate FROM student_courses
